name: eucalyptus
summary: Mechanism context: respiratory support, antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory. Safety: Eucalyptus oil is potentially toxic if ingested and can trigger bronchospasm in sensitive users; topical and inhaled use require dilution and caution.. Interactions tracked: Avoid combining internal oil with sedatives or hepatotoxic exposures, topical products may irritate skin or mucosa..

safetyNotes: Eucalyptus oil is potentially toxic if ingested and can trigger bronchospasm in sensitive users; topical and inhaled use require dilution and caution.
contraindications: Infants/young children for oil exposure near face
interactions: Avoid combining internal oil with sedatives or hepatotoxic exposures
topical products may irritate skin or mucosa.
preparation: Leaf is used as tea or steam; essential oil is used diluted topically or aromatically and should not be taken internally without medical supervision.
